slides.headline: Ready to go beyond basic AI?

caption:
AntiGravity is not just another AI code editor.

It's an agent-first platform where you dispatch parallel agents across workspaces.

Here are 4 workflows nobody is talking about:

1. Voice Agent Pipeline — 3 agents build Vapi integration, audio processing, and deployment simultaneously

2. Full-Stack SaaS — Auth, billing, frontend, and tests built in parallel by separate agents

3. DevOps Mesh — Code audit, CI/CD generation, and infra provisioning on autopilot

4. Data Pipelines — MCP connectors pull live data, agents transform and visualize it

Plus: MCP connectors to GitHub, Supabase, Notion. Multi-model support (Gemini, Claude, GPT). Full browser and terminal autonomy.

This is not about writing code faster.
It's about building systems you couldn't before.

Save this for later.
